title: CPU download-Pod image bakes stale wrapper (no /wrapper/disk) — volume usage bar never shows on CPU Pods
description:
BUG (found live 2026-07-02, CPU download Pod lcs0nzjypyfaqh): the Settings network-volume usage bar (MPI-169) never appears on a No-GPU download Pod. NOT by design — the bar is fed by GET /remote/pod/disk -> wrapper /wrapper/disk (du -sb /workspace), which was written to work on ANY pod. PROOF: the running CPU wrapper's openapi.json lists every route EXCEPT /wrapper/disk, yet /health reports wrapper_version 0.2.23 (a LIE — 0.2.23 is the commit that ADDED /wrapper/disk, mpi-ci a5d1812 2026-07-01; the baked code is 0.2.22).

ROOT: the GPU image bootstraps start.sh + wrapper.py fresh from R2 at every boot (MPI-156 bootstrap.sh), so GPU Pods always run the latest wrapper. Dockerfile.cpu has NO bootstrap — it bakes wrapper.py at build time (COPY wrapper/wrapper.py). The published ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.10.2-cpu was built from the 0.2.22 tree but stamped WRAPPER_VERSION=0.2.23 via build-arg, so /health lies about what it runs. Every wrapper fix since that build silently never reaches CPU Pods — this WILL recur on the next wrapper change.

FIX (proposed): give Dockerfile.cpu the same R2 bootstrap the GPU image uses (fetch wrapper.py + start-cpu.sh at boot, unset CUBRIC_WRAPPER_VERSION on successful fetch so /health stays honest — bootstrap.sh already implements this contract), then rebuild + push a new -cpu tag (build-pod-image skill, user-gated billing/publish) and bump POD_IMAGE_VERSION_CPU in routes/remotePodLifecycle.js. Minimal alternative (no parity): just rebuild -cpu from current wrapper source — fixes today's bar but the divergent update path stays and rots again.

VERIFY: fresh CPU download Pod -> Settings shows the volume usage bar (denominator = volume size, numerator = du of /workspace); /health wrapper_version matches the R2-fetched wrapper. IMPORTANT (user): the bar on CPU Pods is a core promise — download mode exists so users manage installs WITHOUT paying for a GPU. FILES: mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/Dockerfile.cpu, bootstrap.sh, start-cpu.sh; Cubric-Vision routes/remotePodLifecycle.js (POD_IMAGE_VERSION_CPU). Relates: MPI-169 (the bar), MPI-88 (download mode), MPI-156 (GPU bootstrap), MPI-179 (found chasing its verify).
